title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ecom Express. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Meerut-based team.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
